theme_summary: Audit collaboration bus creation, required ledgers, propose->review->improve->consensus flow, and adoption path
consensus_findings: Atomic file operations implemented but inconsistently: stampede.sh uses *.tmp suffix + os.replace, protocol docs mention .tmp- prefix + mv - pattern mismatch
Directory structure documentation gap: README omits pids/ directory that SKILL depends on for liveness checks
Initial ledger writes (swarm-state.json, child-agents.jsonl) use truncating w mode with no atomic temp-file pattern - race unsafe on concurrent re-init
JSONL ledger appends have no line validation - single malformed line breaks telemetry parsing with no recovery mechanism
propose->review->improve->consensus flow is NOT documented as a collaboration bus protocol in either README or SKILL
conflict_notes: Installation path conflict: README uses ~/.copilot/agents/, SKILL checklist references ~/.stampede/agents/
